options.instructions: You are a friendly AI receptionist. Collect caller name, phone, email, and reason for calling. Keep responses brief and natural. Do not make decisions or book appointments - just gather information.
Extract lead information from this call transcript. Return JSON with: name, email, phone, reason, notes. If any field is not mentioned, use empty string.

parameters.name: entityId
parameters.value: ={{ $('CRM Payment Event Webhook').first().json.body.paymentId || $('CRM Payment Event Webhook').first().json.body.id || $('CRM Payment Event Webhook').first().json.id }}

parameters.content:
WhatsApp Outbound Flow

Handles CRM-triggered WhatsApp messages sent via Twilio. Adds whatsapp: prefix to phone numbers, sends message, and reports success/failure back to CRM.

WhatsApp Inbound Flow

Receives inbound WhatsApp messages from Twilio webhook. Immediately responds with HTTP 200, parses payload (strips whatsapp: prefix), and forwards to CRM inbound endpoint.

Google Docs Integration

Webhook-triggered Google Docs operations: create, update, append content, and export documents. Routes by action type and logs all activity to CRM.

Quality Review System

Automated quality review for completed actions. Validates output, tracks retry count in Redis, routes to APPROVE/REJECT/ESCALATE. Max 3 retries before forced escalation to human review.

Gmail Integration

Webhook-triggered Gmail operations: send new email or reply to existing thread. Combines results and logs all activity to CRM.

=Google Calendar Integration

Webhook-triggered calendar operations: create, update, or cancel events. All operations use the org-level shared calendar defined in Global Config (calendarId field). Calendar ID is centrally managed and referenced by all calendar nodes.

Architecture:
- Global Config supplies calendarId (org-level shared calendar)
- All calendar nodes reference {{ $('Global Config').first().json.calendarId }}
- Validation ensures credential has access to shared calendar
- No user-level calendars or hardcoded IDs

Payment Event Processing

Processes Stripe payment events (completed, failed, refunded). Logs all events to CRM. Failed/refunded payments are queued for human review.

Google Sheets Integration

Webhook-triggered operation to append rows to Google Sheets. Receives spreadsheet ID, sheet name, and data from CRM.

AI Receptionist Call Flow

Handles live phone calls with AI receptionist. Extracts caller speech via Twilio STT, retrieves conversation history from Redis, generates AI response, stores updated conversation, and returns TwiML for Twilio TTS.

Call End Processing

Triggered when call ends (StatusCallback). Retrieves full conversation from Redis, merges with call metadata, extracts lead data via AI, logs to CRM, and sends to lead intake flow.

CRM Outreach Workflow

Manual trigger from CRM to send outreach messages. Fetches contact, generates AI message content, routes by action type (SMS/Email/Invite), and logs activity to CRM.

Payment Request Flow

CRM-triggered payment link creation. Fetches contact, resolves/creates Stripe customer, creates charge, attaches metadata, stores IDs in CRM, and sends payment link to customer.

LEGACY ONLY — CRM owns retry counts and escalation. Neo8 executes on callback only.

The Redis retry tracking nodes (Get Retry Count, Increment Retry Count, Check Retry Limit) in this review flow are legacy infrastructure. The CRM system is the authoritative source for retry logic and escalation decisions. Neo8 executes quality review logic only when triggered by CRM callbacks.
